title: TOOL PLUGIN
sub: Flowork lahir tanpa tangan. Isi tangannya di sini: upload tool-pack (.fwpack) buat install, hapus buat uninstall. Akses per-agent diatur di tab Tools tiap Agent.
install_drop: Taruh .fwpack di sini — atau klik buat pilih file
install_hint: Tool-pack itu zip .fwpack (plugin.json kind:tool + agent.wasm). Hot-load seketika — tanpa restart. Capability bahaya (exec/secret/fs-shared) ditolak otomatis.
empty: Belum ada tool plugin. Upload .fwpack di atas buat ngisi tangan Flowork. (Tool MCP dikelola di tab Connections.)
uninstall_confirm: Uninstall tool '{tool}'? Agent bakal kehilangan akses ke tool ini.
